text.title: User Story Mapping Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of User Story Mapping.

example.scenario: Backbone for a project-mgmt tool: 'Sign up → Create Project → Invite Teammate → Track Task → Close Project'. Tasks per activity (3-5); skeleton = magic-link signup, blank project, email invite, plain task list, one-click close. Slice 1 = skeleton; slice 2 adds OAuth + templates + Slack invite + due dates + retro.
